allow: Bash(python -c "import json,pathlib; d=pathlib.Path.home\(\)/'.claude'; [print\(f\) for f in d.iterdir\(\) if 'auth' in f.name.lower\(\) or 'cred' in f.name.lower\(\) or 'token' in f.name.lower\(\)]")
